title: 私が姫！プリンセスロードへ爆走です！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Listen here, little boys! I won't let you get away
with teasing that girl who shares my dream of
becoming a princess!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It makes me think back to when I was little, trying
to join several prestigious running clubs, only to
be rejected...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I've pulverized weakness out of my heart!
Now that I have Trainer with me, I'll definitely
become the strongest princess!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Get ready to eat my Princess☆Tackle—ah, but my
body feels all out of whack, and I can't run well!
What's going on?!
